name: Corporate & M&A
overview: Our Corporate & M&A practice is renowned for advising on high-value, complex cross-border transactions. We guide corporations, financial sponsors, and boards of directors through their most significant strategic decisions, combining commercial acumen with legal precision.

name: Private Equity
overview: Advising at every stage of the investment lifecycle, our Private Equity team supports sponsors, investors, and portfolio management teams. We structure creative and robust solutions for buyouts, growth capital investments, and complex exits.

name: Banking & Finance
overview: We represent lenders and borrowers across a broad spectrum of financing transactions, helping clients secure liquidity and navigate international credit markets. Our expertise covers leveraged finance, direct lending, asset-backed transactions, and debt restructuring.
expertise: Direct Lending and Private Credit Platforms

name: Dispute Resolution
overview: When stakes are high, our litigation and arbitration specialists protect client interests with tenacity and strategic discretion. We handle complex commercial litigation, international arbitrations, and regulatory enforcement investigations globally.

name: Regulatory & Compliance
overview: Helping clients navigate a shifting global regulatory landscape. We provide strategic counsel on financial services regulation, antitrust and competition compliance, data privacy, sanctions, and corporate governance frameworks.

name: Real Estate
overview: Our commercial real estate group coordinates high-profile transactions, development projects, and real estate financings. We advise private capital sponsors, institutional funds, and sovereign investors on major properties and developments.
expertise: Real Estate Credit and Debt Investment

name: Tax Advisory
overview: Providing sophisticated tax structuring for domestic and international transactions. We ensure tax efficiency for corporate mergers, private capital funds, financial instruments, and real estate investments while managing regulatory risks.
expertise: Fund Structure and Incentive Tax Planning
Structured Finance and Debt Tax Issues

name: Technology & Innovation
overview: At the intersection of law and cutting-edge science, our Tech & Innovation practice advises pioneers and large enterprises on intellectual property, digital transformation, artificial intelligence governance, and high-growth venture matters.
